category_sources: Official JOE homepage describes it as a terminal-based screen editor.
source_facts.description says it is a full featured terminal-based screen editor.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is JOE - Joe's Own Editor.
docs_sources: Official JOE homepage links to the User Manual and describes project features.
repo_sources: Official JOE homepage says the source code is controlled under Mercurial.
Official JOE installation instructions list the read-only Mercurial checkout URL hg clone http://hg.code.sf.net/p/joe-editor/mercurial.
tags_sources: Official JOE homepage describes terminal editing, C implementation, WordStar-style behavior, and console variants.
source_facts.description identifies a terminal-based screen editor.
